final:
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input rst,
	 input [31:0] in,
    output reg [31:0] out
    );always @(posedge clk or posedge rst)
      if (rst) begin
			out <= 32'b0;
      end else begin
			out <= in;
      end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      out <= ~in;
    end
  end

endmodule
